title: Afrocayratia gracilis
taxonomy: Afrocayratia gracilis belongs to the family Cymbedaceae, which is a group of flowering plants. This plant is classified as a type of flowering plant, specifically a member of the order Lamiales. Within the kingdom Plantae, Afrocayratia gracilis falls under the class Magnoliopsida.
